TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Mkzihing, title = Mkzihing, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mkzihing} }

S.FORM: alang Mkzihing ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 51 buwan, 147 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 76% kyan ku 111 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 24% kyan ku 36 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 71%, Paywan 2%, Bunun 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mkzihing hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Mkzihing hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Mkzihing hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Mkzihing hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mkzihing hya' ga Mknahuy. tay 'llaw na Mkzihing hya' ga Piling. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Mkzihing ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 51 buwan, 147 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 76% kyan ku 111 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 24% kyan ku 36 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 71%, Paywan 2%, Bunun 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Mkzihing hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Mkzihing hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Mkzihing hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na Mkzihing hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Mkzihing hya' ga Mknahuy. tay 'llaw na Mkzihing hya' ga Piling. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ mkziħiŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, pajwan *%, βunun *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na mkziħiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na mkziħiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na mkziħiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na mkziħiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na mkziħiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa mknaħuj. taj ʔllaw na mkziħiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa piliŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
